log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster.
→ Tiefling — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 20] FAIL! 36 necrotic damage. HP: 31/67
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 31/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 3 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tiefling — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 32 fire damage + .
